title: Argentinian-Style Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap inspired by Argentinian cuisine, filled with grilled meats and served with a side of tangy slaw.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the steak with salt and black pepper, and grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and a squeeze of lime juice.
In a large bowl, combine sliced peppers, onion, cucumber, and tomato.
Drizzle the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and toss to coat.
Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading mashed avocado on the tortilla, followed by sliced steak, vegetables, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
